name: Lime Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken and the next 7 ingredients in a Dutch oven.
2. Bring to boil over high heat.
3. Cover, reduce heat; simmer for 1 hour.
4. Remove chicken and reserve broth. Let chicken cool.
5. Bone and chop chicken; set aside.
6. Strain broth through a fine-mesh sieve into bowl, discarding vegetables.
7. In the same Dutch oven, sauté green pepper and onion in 2 tbsp oil over medium heat until tender.
8. Stir in tomatoes (from reserved jar or canned) with juice.
9. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Add reserved broth, lime rind, and lime juice; stir well.
11. Bring to boil; reduce heat, simmer uncovered for 20 minutes.
12. Stir in chicken pieces, salt, and pepper; simmer uncovered for an additional 10 minutes.
13. Cut each tortilla into 8 wedges; fry in hot oil until crisp.
14. Drain excess oil on paper towels.
15. To serve, place 8 tortilla wedges in the center of each soup bowl.
16. Ladle in hot lime soup.
17. Garnish with lime slices and fresh cilantro if desired.
Yield: Approximately 8 cups
